current_runtime_skeleton.notes: This remains the active runtime structure until a later migration explicitly changes it.

decisions: This PR does not wire runtime.
B5-B1 is the canonical core body staging import track.
P0 selector QA fix remains a later branch.
B5-H rendered QA remains a pre-launch gate.
